user.title: Kermi X-Center
user.description: Enter your Kermi X-Center installation ID. Click the ?-Help button for instructions on how to find it.

auth.title: Kermi OAuth Login
auth.description: Open the authorization URL, sign in to Kermi, then paste the full login callback referer URL (use browser dev tools).

error.missing_code: The callback URL does not contain an authorization code.
error.invalid_state: The callback URL does not match this login attempt.

abort.already_configured: This Kermi X-Center installation is already configured.

init.title: Kermi X-Center Options
init.description: Configure how often Home Assistant refreshes data from the Kermi cloud. The default is {default_interval} minutes. Shorter intervals provide faster updates but generate more API traffic.
